title: Towards Fairness under Label Bias in Image Segmentation: Impact, Measurement and Mitigation
authors: Aditya Parikh, Stella Frank, Sneha Das, Aasa Feragen
description: Label bias is insidious: We measure and mitigate it in image segmentation without clean, unbiased ground truth labels even when standard metrics don't allow. We also show a subgroup separability effect induced due to label bias.

title: Measuring What VLMs Don't Say: Validation Metrics Hide Clinical Terminology Erasure in Radiology Report Generation
authors: Aditya Parikh, Aasa Feragen, Sneha Das, Stella Frank
description: Standard validation metrics hide severe clinical terminology erasure in report generation (RRG), proposing CAD/WAE which measures displacement between word-association between human reference and predicted reports.

title: Fair Lung Disease Diagnosis from Chest CT via Gender-Adversarial Attention Multiple Instance Learning
description: CVPR Workshop SUbmission: A concept-level balancing network utilizing gender-adversarial attention weights to decouple demographic attributes from predictive features in multiple instance learning architectures.

title: Investigating Label Bias and Representational Sources of Age-Related Disparities in Medical Segmentation
authors: Aditya Parikh, Sneha Das, Aasa Feragen
description: First study on label bias in segmentation, demonstrating how standard Dice scores obscure underlying representational harms and how automated machine-generated labels can cause more harm than they help.

title: Who Does Your Algorithm Fail? Investigating Age and Ethnic Bias in the MAMA-MIA Dataset
authors: Aditya Parikh, Sneha Das, Aasa Feragen
description: Providing empirical evidence of severe disparity curves under demographic shifts.

title: Leveraging Transfer Learning with Class-Specific Decoders for Laparoscopic Segmentation
authors: Priya Priya*, Aditya Parikh*, et al.
venue: IEEE Workshop on Big Data Analytics for Medical Imaging
description: Proposes decoupled class-specific decoder branches optimized with cross-level shared encoders to mitigate significant foreground-background class imbalance.

title: Representation Learning for Laparoscopic Imaging: A Study of Architectural Design and Multi-Level Knowledge Transfer
authors: Aditya Parikh, Sai Jitin Jami, et al.
description: Comprehensive study of embedding topology and multi-stage self-supervised pre-training to improve laparoscopic surgical view representations.

title: Learning from a Few Shots: Data-efficient Cervical Vertebral Maturation Assessment
authors: Helen Schneider*, Aditya Parikh*, et al.
description: Establishes a highly efficient prototypical metric learning approach capable of accurate skeletal maturity stage prediction from extremely sparse labeled examples.

title: Effective Disjoint Representational Learning for Anatomical Segmentation
authors: Priya Priya*, Aditya Parikh*, et al.
description: Decouples anatomical features from modality-specific texture channels using mutual information minimization constraints to achieve strong generalization.

title: First Investigation of Deep Learning for Intraoperative Gauze Segmentation in Minimally Invasive Abdominal Surgery
authors: Priya Priya*, Aditya Parikh, et al.
description: Pioneering empirical validation of real-time multi-scale segmentation backbones detecting blood-soaked gauze pads under surgical fluid occlusion.

title: The Potential of Acknowledging the Unknown: Single Positive Multi-label Learning in Medical Image Processing
authors: Helen Schneider, Priya Priya, Aditya Parikh, et al.
description: Adapts loss functions to treat unobserved classes as latent unknowns rather than strict negatives, outperforming standard binary cross-entropy baselines.

title: Informed Deep Abstaining Classifier: Investigating Noise-Robust Training for Diagnostic Decision Support Systems
authors: Helen Schneider, Sebastian Nowak, Aditya Parikh, et al.
description: Integrates confidence thresholds directly into backpropagation updates allowing networks to safely abstain on highly noisy samples during clinical training.

title: Mandibular Advancement Devices: Impact on Occlusal Dynamics and Tooth Alignment Modifications
authors: Aylin Uyaner, Helen Schneider, Aditya Parikh, et al.
description: Quantitative spatio-temporal study of long-term mandibular device integration tracking sub-millimeter displacement dynamics in patient cohorts.

title: Exploring Facial Biomarkers for Depression through Temporal Analysis of Action Units
authors: Aditya Parikh, Misha Sadegi, Bjorn Eskofier
description: Fuses multi-frame facial action unit activations with physiological signals using sequence-to-sequence transformers to predict clinical depression scale attributes.

title: Information Extraction from Unstructured Data using Augmented-AI and Computer Vision
description: Presents a hybrid bounding-box OCR and semantic field detection pipeline deployed on historical population census microfilms to automate digitization.
